snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.union.get(
    request="string",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.union.get(
        request="string",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, TokenizeCard

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.union.testcamelcaseproperties(
        payment_method=TokenizeCard(
            method="method",
            card_number="cardNumber",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
